body.docName: 分页查询药品院内目录
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/hospital-list/drug/page 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/hospital-list/drug/page 
 ## 接口描述 
用于医招智付场景分页查询药品院内目录信息，对应页面为医招智付-目录管理-药品院内目录-全部院内目录处列表页，单次查询不能超过500条 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"hospitalListIdList","required":false,"label":"%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95ID%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%2212202035564056%22%2C%221819214365319634946%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BAString%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"productCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22XA16AAL002N001010178554%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BAString%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E4%BB%8E%E7%AC%AC0%E9%A1%B5%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B","sensitive":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"50","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7500%E6%9D%A1","sensitive":false}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E7%AC%A6%E5%90%88%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"hospitalListId","required":false,"label":"%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95ID","exampleValue":"12202035564056","desc":"","sensitive":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterpriseName","required":false,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E9%83%BD%E5%80%8D%E7%89%B9%E8%8D%AF%E4%B8%9A%E8%82%A1%E4%BB%BD%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productCode","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"XA16AAL002N001010178554","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productName","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"a","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","desc":"%20yyyy%2FMM%2Fdd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass","name":"dataChangeTime","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2024%2F11%2F21%2018%3A28%3A56"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productSpec","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E8%A7%84%E6%A0%BC","exampleValue":"0.67g%3AL-%E8%B0%B7%E6%B0%A8%E9%85%B0%E8%83%BA%20%20663.3mg%2C%20%E5%91%B1%E4%BB%91%E9%85%B8%E9%92%A02.0mg","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productId","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81ID","exampleValue":"93324","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AEID","exampleValue":"0-1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productPackaging","required":false,"label":"%E5%8C%85%E8%A3%85","exampleValue":"0.67g%3AL-%E8%B0%B7%E6%B0%A8%E9%85%B0%E8%83%BA%20%20663.3mg%2C%20%E5%91%B1%E4%BB%91%E9%85%B8%E9%92%A02.0mg%C3%9715%E8%A2%8B%2F%E5%8C%85","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"packageMaterial","required":false,"label":"%E5%8C%85%E8%A3%85%E6%9D%90%E8%B4%A8","exampleValue":"%E9%80%8F%E6%98%8E%E8%81%9A%E4%B9%99%E7%83%AF%E5%92%8C%E7%99%BD%E8%B5%9B%E7%92%90%E7%8E%A2","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"hospitalPurchasePrice","required":false,"label":"%E5%8C%BB%E9%99%A2%E9%87%87%E8%B4%AD%E4%BB%B7%E6%A0%BC","exampleValue":"18.88000","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E%E4%BA%94%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(18,5)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"publicOnlinePrice","required":false,"label":"%E6%8C%82%E7%BD%91%E4%BB%B7%E6%A0%BC","exampleValue":"19.88000","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E%E4%BA%94%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(18,5)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"produceEnterpriseCode","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%9F%E4%BA%A7%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"914603000757364189","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"produceEnterpriseName","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%9F%E4%BA%A7%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"Kotobuki%20Pharmaceutical%20Co.%2CLtd.","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"deliverEnterpriseCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"b1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"essentialDrugType","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%BA%E8%8D%AF%E5%B1%9E%E6%80%A7","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%3A%E5%9F%BA%E8%8D%AF%EF%BC%8C3%3A%E9%9D%9E%E5%9F%BA%E8%8D%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"essentialDrugTypeVal","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%BA%E8%8D%AF%E5%B1%9E%E6%80%A7%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"%E5%9F%BA%E8%8D%AF","desc":"%20%E5%9F%BA%E8%8D%AF%2F%E9%9D%9E%E5%9F%BA%E8%8D%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"highSaleLimitPrice","required":false,"label":"%E6%9C%80%E9%AB%98%E9%94%80%E5%94%AE%E9%99%90%E4%BB%B7","exampleValue":"19.88000","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E%E4%BA%94%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(18,5)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"priceUnit","required":false,"label":"%E4%BB%B7%E6%A0%BC%E5%8D%95%E4%BD%8D","exampleValue":"%E7%B2%92","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"hospitalListCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"23456","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productModel","required":false,"label":"%E5%89%82%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"%E9%A2%97%E7%B2%92%E5%89%82","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"declareEnterpriseCode","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E6%8A%A5%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"913710007062493501","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"declareEnterpriseName","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E6%8A%A5%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E8%BF%AA%E6%B2%99%E8%8D%AF%E4%B8%9A%E9%9B%86%E5%9B%A2%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","desc":""}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
  "hospitalListIdList":["12202035564056","1819214365319634946"],
  "productCodeList":["XA16AAL002N001010178554"],
  "start": 0,
  "limit": 50
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": {
        "total": 1,
        "list": [
            {
                "hospitalListId": "12202035564056",
                "deliverEnterpriseName": "成都倍特药业股份有限公司",
                "productCode": "XA16AAL002N001010178554",
                "productName": "a",
                "dataChangeTime": "2024/11/21 18:28:56",
                "productSpec": "0.67g:L-谷氨酰胺  663.3mg, 呱仑酸钠2.0mg",
                "productId": "93324",
                "projectId": "0-1",
                "productPackaging": "0.67g:L-谷氨酰胺  663.3mg, 呱仑酸钠2.0mg×15袋/包",
                "packageMaterial": "透明聚乙烯和白赛璐玢",
                "hospitalPurchasePrice": 18.88000,
                "publicOnlinePrice": 19.88000,
                "produceEnterpriseCode": "914603000757364189",
                "produceEnterpriseName": "Kotobuki Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd.",
                "deliverEnterpriseCode": "b1",
                "essentialDrugType": "1",
                "essentialDrugTypeVal": "基药",
                "highSaleLimitPrice": 19.88000,
                "priceUnit": "粒",
                "hospitalListCode": "23456",
                "productModel": "颗粒剂",
                "declareEnterpriseCode": "913710007062493501",
                "declareEnterpriseName": "迪沙药业集团有限公司"
            }
        ]
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | EROOR1| 调用失败|
  | EROOR2| 执行失败，分页查出最大限制、当前企业未配置集采平台信息等|
  | SUC0000| 执行成功|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/hospital-list/drug/page

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/hospital-list/drug/page

接口描述

用于医招智付场景分页查询药品院内目录信息，对应页面为医招智付-目录管理-药品院内目录-全部院内目录处列表页，单次查询不能超过500条

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"hospitalListIdList","required":false,"label":"%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95ID%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%2212202035564056%22%2C%221819214365319634946%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BAString%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"productCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22XA16AAL002N001010178554%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BAString%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E4%BB%8E%E7%AC%AC0%E9%A1%B5%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B","sensitive":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"50","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7500%E6%9D%A1","sensitive":false}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数
